name: Dilly Zucchini Ricotta Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare a muffin pan by lining it with paper baking cups or greasing the cups.
3. In a large bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and dill weed until well combined.
4. In a medium bowl, whisk together milk, melted margarine/butter, and eggs. Stir in ricotta cheese and shredded zucchini until smooth.
5. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened (the batter will be stiff).
6. Fill each prepared muffin cup about 2/3 full with batter.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the pan immediately and serve.
